---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest improvements or report issues in documentation, guides, or comments.
title: '[DOC] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

## Area of Documentation
Specify the location of the documentation that needs improvement (e.g., README.md, API docs, inline code comments, Wiki, setup guide).

## Problem Description
Describe the issue with the current documentation (e.g., outdated commands, typos, missing context, confusing steps).

## Proposed Correction / Improvement
Provide the corrected text, new commands, or updated guide.

## Assign / Tag Staff
Please tag the project's response team / staff below:
- Admin/Maintainers: @trhgquan
- Staff: @meadoge
- Staff: @hwangswan
